name: TC-LOGIN-002: Wrong password is rejected with a descriptive error
description:
Data-driven login test.

    Each JSON entry drives one test case.  The *tc* dict carries
    id, title, story, severity, tags, username, password, and
    optionally expected_error (for negative cases).

steps.name: Verify error message contains 'do not match'

parameters.name: tc
